archetype: Performance Pro / Swiss High-Contrast Hybrid (Command Center)

layout.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
layout.card: bg-[#0F2040] border border-[#1A7A6E]/20 rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col h-full
layout.navigation: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-16 lg:w-64 bg-[#0A1628] border-r border-[#1A7A6E]/20 flex flex-col transition-all duration-300

components.button_primary: bg-[#C9922A] text-[#0A1628] font-bold hover:bg-[#A87B23] hover:text-[#0A1628] transition-colors rounded px-6 py-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(201,146,42,0.2)]
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A7A6E] text-[#1A7A6E] hover:bg-[#1A7A6E]/10 hover:text-[#1A7A6E] transition-colors rounded px-6 py-2
components.status_tag: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-[#1A7A6E]/20 text-[#1A7A6E] border border-[#1A7A6E]/30 uppercase tracking-widest
components.input: bg-[#0A1628] border border-[#1A7A6E]/30 text-[#F5F5F5] rounded px-4 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C9922A] focus:border-[#C9922A] placeholder-[#9CA3AF]
components.table_th: bg-[#0A1628] border-b border-[#1A7A6E]/30 text-xs font-mono text-[#9CA3AF] uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4
components.table_td: border-b border-[#1A7A6E]/10 py-3 px-4 text-sm text-[#F5F5F5]

visual_enhancements.surface_strategy: The 'Grid Borders' Technical Look. Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid borders to create a radar/command center feel.
visual_enhancements.glassmorphism: Avoid heavy glass on dashboards. Use flat solid surfaces with sharp borders to prevent visual refraction of financial data.
visual_enhancements.hover_states: Hover states must explicitly set text color. Cards should have slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) and border color change on hover.
visual_enhancements.animations: Minimalist micro-interactions. Smooth fade transitions for page loads. NO bouncy spring animations.

image_urls.description: Large cargo ship loaded with colorful containers in open ocean. Use for public landing page hero section.
Colorful African textiles for the Export Catalog / Marketplace.
African agriculture representation for staple foods/products.
Blue hexagonal symbol representing GetAnchor banking partner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required icon library: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react (best for dense dashboards).

CRITICAL COLOR RULE: strictly follow the variables. --color-navy #0A1628 for main background, --color-gold #C9922A for actions/key metrics, --color-teal #1A7A6E for status/links, and #0F2040 for card surfaces.
TYPOGRAPHY OVERRIDE: User forced Inter for headings. You MUST use extreme letter-spacing (tracking-tighter) and heavy weights (font-bold) to offset the AI-default look of Inter.
DATA FORMATTING: All financial data, balances, IDs, transaction hashes, and live exchange rates MUST use JetBrains Mono.
DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Use 'Control Room' grid layout. Ensure grid items stretch to match heights (h-full). Side navigation is sticky/fixed on the left.
MARKETING PAGE: The public marketing page should use the same dark theme but allow for larger imagery and parallax scrolling (use Framer Motion).
ACCESSIBILITY: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='withdraw-funds-button').
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn components for complex UI (tables, dropdowns, select) but strip their default borders/backgrounds to match our #0F2040 cards and #1A7A6E borders.
NO PLACEHOLDERS: Use ONLY the image URLs provided in this file. Never use dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
